name: rapp-zoo
summary: Your personal Pokédex of digital organisms on this device. Browse what you've caught, catch new ones from the global rapp_store catalog, hatch / start / stop / inspect — all from inside your brainstem.
_note: v0.3.0 IS the canonical rapplication shape — agent (chat face) + organ (HTTP backplane at /api/rapp_zoo/*) + UI bundle (skin). Hatches into any brainstem like every other rapplication; no separate process. The local-first/global-aware split is intentional: rapp_store is the *global* catalog (everyone's organisms), rapp-zoo is *this user's personal* Pokédex (organisms on this device + a discover view onto the global catalog when online). Pulls from rapp_store via the egg_hatcher when the user clicks ⚡ Hot-load.
